text:
EXPLANATION: The arXiv paper at 2312.15211v1 has the title "MACE-OFF23: Transferable Machine Learning Force Fields for Organic Molecules," which closely matches the cited title (the cited "Mace-off23" is simply a case/formatting variant). The cited authors are a subset of the real author list — the only discrepancy is the omission of one author (Yixuan Pu), and all other cited authors match. The paper is real, published at the correct arXiv ID in v1, and the title/author differences are minor formatting and one missing co-author rather than wholesale fabrication.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.15211v1
FOUND_TITLE: MACE-OFF23: Transferable Machine Learning Force Fields for Organic Molecules
FOUND_AUTHORS: Dávid Péter Kovács, J. Harry Moore, Nicholas J. Browning, Ilyes Batatia, Joshua T. Horton, Venkat Kapil, William C. Witt, Ioan-Bogdan Magdău, Daniel J. Cole, Gábor Csányi
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
